历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 6038 → 6067 → 5561 → 7775 → 5610, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (physics-chemistry binding), there was a significant backward shift to 7775th place, but it quickly rebounded to 5610th place in 2025, indicating that the university still has strong appeal among Physics Category candidates. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5610th place. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 42 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 33, a reduction of 7 students (-17.5%) compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, theoretically making the admission ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, Shandong University (main campus) is approximately 22nd on the main list. The Weihai campus shares the 985 platform, with a relatively high level, and has sustained appeal to candidates. In recent years, Shandong University (main campus) has had a somewhat negative reputation (e.g., the 'study buddy' incident), but the Weihai campus operates relatively independently, so the impact is limited. On Douyin (TikTok), Shandong University (main campus) ranks 20th (high heat), while the Weihai campus is not separately tracked. No records of enrollment gaps for the Weihai campus have been observed. Shandong University (main campus) has A- and above disciplines including Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Clinical Medicine A-, Law A-, Physics A-, etc. The majors offered at the Weihai campus (Electronic Information, Mathematics, Physics) are highly correlated with these advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information (including Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering) is a highly recommended major for 2026, with high social attention. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 204,000 in 2026 (+6%), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the 2025 baseline ranking of 5610th place, the significant enrollment reduction of 17.5% in 2026 (making the ranking number smaller), and the increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province by about 6% (making the ranking number larger), the impact of the enrollment reduction slightly outweighs the candidate increase. However, given the university's 985 level and the sustained appeal of high-heat Electronic Information majors, the ranking will not drop excessively. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5051st place, with a range of 4551–5551st place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Intelligent Engineering New Engineering Experimental Class) (including Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Science and Technology, Robotics Engineering, Low-Altitude Technology and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Physics (including Physics)
- Marine Science (including Marine Science, Marine Resource Development Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4551–5551, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Mathematics as the main choice. Tier 1 Electronic Information can be a reach (requires a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range). Tier 3 Physics and Marine Science can serve as safety options. Electronic Information includes popular directions like Computer Science and Technology, and is the most competitive.
